'''sasuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:poddidge|poddidge]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-s-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poddidge|poddidge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sasuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæsiwith|sæsiwith]] || [[word:sæsiwij|sæsiwij]] || [[word:sæsiwish|sæsiwish]] || [[word:sæsiwi|sæsiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sasusuwuth|sasusuwuth]] || [[word:sasusuwuj|sasusuwuj]] || [[word:sasusuwush|sasusuwush]] || [[word:sasusuwu|sasusuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sasuwuth|sasuwuth]] || [[word:sasuwuj|sasuwuj]] || [[word:sasuwush|sasuwush]] || [[word:sasuwu|sasuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sasufwuth|sasufwuth]] || [[word:sasufwuj|sasufwuj]] || [[word:sasufwush|sasufwush]] || [[word:sasufwuf|sasufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sasuwuthu|sasuwuthu]] || [[word:sasuwuju|sasuwuju]] || [[word:sasuwushu|sasuwushu]] || [[word:sasuwuku|sasuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sasuwuth|sasuwuth]] || [[word:sasuwuj|sasuwuj]] || [[word:sasuwush|sasuwush]] || [[word:sasuwu|sasuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sasuwuthul|sasuwuthul]] || [[word:sasuwujul|sasuwujul]] || [[word:sasuwushul|sasuwushul]] || [[word:sasuwukul|sasuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sasuwuthuthu|sasuwuthuthu]] || [[word:sasuwujuju|sasuwujuju]] || [[word:sasuwushushu|sasuwushushu]] || [[word:sasuwuku|sasuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sasuwuthun|sasuwuthun]] || [[word:sasuwujun|sasuwujun]] || [[word:sasuwushun|sasuwushun]] || [[word:sasuwukun|sasuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sasuwuthuoro|sasuwuthuoro]] || [[word:sasuwujuoro|sasuwujuoro]] || [[word:sasuwushuoro|sasuwushuoro]] || [[word:sasuwukuoro|sasuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
